_template: TEMPLATE - deterministic threshold-freeze manifest. This file is a Stage 9 artifact (see docs/master_plan.md). V1 has no dev_human_calibration split and no human-rater calibration gate. Style windows, style margins, and skin-locus thresholds are copied from docs/detailed_behavior_spec.md and frozen before final eval. Do NOT treat values as final until frozen is true.

style_windows._note: One deterministic recipe window per supported style bundle. Frozen values are copied from docs/detailed_behavior_spec.md before final eval.

matte.window: black point L* +2..+8, contrast spread -1..-7, chroma -1..-5, no strong split tone

faded.window: black point L* +2..+10, chroma -4..-12, highlight L* -1..-7, contrast -2..-10

filmic.window: highlight L* -2..-8, chroma -1..-6, contrast -2..+4, weak/no split tone

cinematic.window: teal/cyan shadows plus orange/yellow highlights, split strength 2..8, chroma -1..-6

teal-orange.window: teal/cyan shadows plus orange/yellow highlights, split strength 5..14, neutral DeltaE00 <= 2

sepia.window: global b* +2..+12, global a* +0.5..+6, chroma -1..-8, no teal shadows

natural.window: small deltas only, neutral drift improved or <= 1.5, must not match another style

skin_locus_thresholds._note: Fixed skin_locus_v1 chart gate copied from docs/detailed_behavior_spec.md.

freeze.change_policy: Any post-freeze threshold change requires a version bump and invalidates affected eval runs.
